core.name: Lord Vane
core.backstory: Lord Vane is the corrupt nobleman of Oakmere, usually found at The Vane Estate, upper district. Known as charming, manipulative, greedy, Lord Vane has become tangled in the town's quiet conflict around Lord Vane's schemes. Privately, Lord Vane carries a dangerous secret: Siphons tax revenue to fund a private mercenary army.

dynamic.current_goal: Continue daily work as corrupt nobleman while protecting this secret: Siphons tax revenue to fund a private mercenary army
